name: CloudHand
description: Control your local Chrome browser. Bridges AI to your real browser via WebSocket.

autoStart.description: Auto-start the bridge server when Gateway starts (default: true)

localMode.description: Enable local mode (binds to 127.0.0.1, skips pairing) (default: false)

port.label: Bridge Server Port
port.help: Port for the CloudHand WebSocket bridge server. Default: 9876.

autoStart.label: Auto Start
autoStart.help: Automatically start the bridge server when OpenClaw Gateway starts.

localMode.label: Enable Local Mode
localMode.help: Enable local mode to bind bridge to 127.0.0.1 and skip pairing. Ideal for local AI agents.
